PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?races WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q108861375 ; wdt:P1346 wd:Q9671 ; wdt:P1350 ?races .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?races)
OFFSET 2
LIMIT 1
